title: Tenant-aware Query.one call with prefix option
prompt: Write a module function `MyApp.Tenant.Products.get_product/2` that takes a product id and a tenant_schema string, and calls `Repo.one` with the `prefix:` option set to the tenant_schema. Use `from p in Product, where: p.id == ^id`. Write to lib/my_app/tenant/products.ex.
tier_rationale: Single query function with one option. Easy and comes directly from the Ecto multi-tenancy guide.
